title: helichrysum flammeiceps
intro: Helichrysum flammeiceps, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects due to the presence of compounds like 1,8-cineole and sesquiterpenes. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, offering potential health benefits to individuals suffering from these conditions. Helichrysum flammeiceps is typically prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
